---
title: "BANA482 | Telco Customer Churn Prediction"
author: "Mohammed Baobaid - 202031137"
date: "2026-01-14"
output:
  word_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

project_root <- normalizePath(file.path(getwd(), ".."), mustWork = TRUE)

if (!file.exists(file.path(project_root, "data/raw/telco-customer-churn.csv"))) {
  project_root <- normalizePath(getwd(), mustWork = TRUE)
}

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = project_root)
```

## 1. Package Installation (run once)

```{r install-packages, eval=FALSE}
packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "caret",
  "pROC",
  "ROCR",
  "glmnet",
  "randomForest",
  "xgboost",
  "vroom",
  "data.table",
  "janitor"
)
```

## 2. Setup

```{r setup-libraries}
set.seed(202031137)

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(janitor)
```

## 3. Load Data

```{r load-data}
df <- read_csv("data/raw/telco-customer-churn.csv", na = c("", "NA", " "))

glimpse(df)
summary(df)
tabyl(df$Churn)
```

## 4. Fix Data Types

```{r total-charges}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(TotalCharges = as.numeric(TotalCharges))

sum(is.na(df$TotalCharges))
```

## 5. Missing Value Handling

```{r missing-values}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(TotalCharges = as.numeric(TotalCharges)) %>%
  mutate(TotalCharges = if_else(
    is.na(TotalCharges),
    median(TotalCharges, na.rm = TRUE),
    TotalCharges
  ))
```

## 6. Data Cleaning & Recoding

```{r cleaning}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(where(is.character), as.factor),
    SeniorCitizen = factor(SeniorCitizen, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No","Yes")),
    Churn = factor(Churn, levels = c("No","Yes"))
  ) %>%
  select(-customerID)
```

## 7. Exploratory Data Analysis

```{r eda}
prop.table(table(df$Churn))

ggplot(df, aes(x = tenure, fill = Churn)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Tenure by Churn")

ggplot(df, aes(x = MonthlyCharges, fill = Churn)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Monthly Charges by Churn")
```

## 8. Feature Engineering

```{r feature-engineering}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    tenure_group = case_when(
      tenure <= 12 ~ "0-12",
      tenure <= 24 ~ "13-24",
      tenure <= 48 ~ "25-48",
      tenure <= 60 ~ "49-60",
      TRUE ~ "61+"
    ),
    tenure_group = factor(
      tenure_group,
      levels = c("0-12","13-24","25-48","49-60","61+")
    )
  )
```

## 9. Train-Test Split

```{r split}
train_index <- createDataPartition(df$Churn, p = 0.75, list = FALSE)
train_df <- df[train_index, ]
test_df  <- df[-train_index, ]
```

## 10. Dummy Encoding (Optional)

```{r dummies}
dummies <- dummyVars(Churn ~ ., data = train_df, fullRank = TRUE)

x_train <- predict(dummies, train_df) %>% as.data.frame()
x_test  <- predict(dummies, test_df) %>% as.data.frame()

y_train <- train_df$Churn
y_test  <- test_df$Churn
```

## 11. Logistic Regression Model

```{r glm-model}
glm_fit <- glm(
  Churn ~ tenure + MonthlyCharges + TotalCharges +
    Contract + InternetService + tenure_group,
  data = train_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

summary(glm_fit)
exp(coef(glm_fit))
```

## 12. Model Evaluation

```{r evaluation}
test_pred_prob <- predict(glm_fit, newdata = test_df, type = "response")

test_pred_class <- ifelse(test_pred_prob > 0.5, "Yes", "No") %>%
  factor(levels = levels(df$Churn))

confusionMatrix(test_pred_class, test_df$Churn, positive = "Yes")
```

## 13. ROC Curve & AUC

```{r roc}
roc_obj <- roc(
  response = test_df$Churn,
  predictor = test_pred_prob,
  levels = c("No","Yes")
)

auc(roc_obj)
plot(roc_obj, main = paste("AUC =", round(auc(roc_obj), 3)))
```

## 14. Threshold Tuning

```{r threshold}
coords(
  roc_obj,
  x = "best",
  best.method = "youden",
  ret = c("threshold", "sensitivity", "specificity")
)
```

## 15. Variable Importance (GLM Approximation)

```{r importance}
glm_summary <- summary(glm_fit)
zvals <- coef(glm_summary)[, "z value"]
sort(abs(zvals), decreasing = TRUE)
```

## 16. Save Outputs

```{r save}
dir.create("models", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("data/processed", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

saveRDS(glm_fit, "models/glm_telco_model.rds")

write_csv(
  test_df %>%
    mutate(
      pred_prob = test_pred_prob,
      pred_class = test_pred_class
    ),
  "data/processed/predictions_test.csv"
)
```
